text:
The Special Operations Squad is a team of elite soldiers handpicked by Levi to take care of Eren Yeager. It formerly consisted of Eld Jinn, Gunther Schultz, Oluo Bozado and Petra Ral. Other articles with this name include:

Special Operations Squad (Anime) - The anime counterpart.
Special Operations Squad (Chapter) - The 20th chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
Special Operations Squad: Eve of the Counterattack, Part 2 - The 15th episode of the Attack on Titan anime.
